mapper.sql: ledger_id, sales_id, order_id, order_no, channel_id, binding_type, business_type, base_amount, applied_rate, raw_amount, compress_ratio, amount, status, accrue_at, accrued_at, settlement_id, create_time, update_time

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ua.user_id, SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT(NULLIF(ua.province, '') ORDER BY ua.is_default DESC, ua.address_id DESC SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1 ) AS province FROM jst_user_address ua WHERE ua.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY ua.user_id ) addr ON addr.user_id = c.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jst_sales_commission_ledger ( ledger_id, sales_id, order_id, order_no, channel_id, binding_type, business_type, base_amount, applied_rate, raw_amount, compress_ratio, amount, status, accrue_at, accrued_at, settlement_id, create_time ) VALUES ( #{ledgerId}, #{salesId}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{channelId}, #{bindingType}, #{businessType}, #{baseAmount}, #{appliedRate}, #{rawAmount}, #{compressRatio}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{accrueAt}, #{accruedAt}, #{settlementId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO jst_sales_commission_ledger ( ledger_id, sales_id, order_id, order_no, channel_id, binding_type, business_type, base_amount, applied_rate, raw_amount, compress_ratio, amount, status, accrue_at, create_time ) VALUES
(#{r.ledgerId},#{r.salesId},#{r.orderId},#{r.orderNo},#{r.channelId},#{r.bindingType}, #{r.businessType},#{r.baseAmount},#{r.appliedRate},#{r.rawAmount},#{r.compressRatio}, #{r.amount},#{r.status},#{r.accrueAt},NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ledger_id FROM jst_sales_commission_ledger WHERE status = 'pending' AND accrue_at <= NOW() LIMIT 1000
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_sales_commission_ledger SET status = 'accrued', accrued_at = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE ledger_id IN #{id} AND status = 'pending'
UPDATE jst_sales_commission_ledger SET status = 'cancelled', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.channel_id AS channelId, o.business_type AS businessType, o.net_pay_amount AS netPayAmount, o.pay_time AS payTime FROM jst_order_main o WHERE o.order_status = 'paid' AND o.channel_id IS NOT NULL AND o.pay_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM jst_sales_commission_ledger l WHERE l.order_id = o.order_id ) LIMIT 200
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_sales_commission_ledger SET status = 'settled', settlement_id = #{settlementId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE sales_id = #{salesId} AND status = 'accrued' AND accrued_at >= #{periodStart} AND accrued_at < #{periodEnd}
UPDATE jst_sales_commission_ledger SET status = 'paid', update_time = NOW() WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} AND status = 'settled'
UPDATE jst_sales_commission_ledger SET status = 'accrued', settlement_id = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} AND status = 'settled'
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT channel_id) AS channelCount, COALESCE(SUM(base_amount), 0) AS totalGmv, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalCommission, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('pending','accrued') THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingCommission, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('settled','paid') THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS settledCommission FROM jst_sales_commission_ledger
AND sales_id = #{salesId} AND create_time >= #{periodStart} AND create_time < #{periodEnd}

SELECT l.*, sa.sales_name AS sales_name_join, ch.channel_name AS channel_name_join FROM jst_sales_commission_ledger l LEFT JOIN jst_sales sa ON l.sales_id = sa.sales_id LEFT JOIN jst_channel ch ON l.channel_id = ch.channel_id AND ch.del_flag = '0' WHERE l.settlement_id = #{settlementId} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(base_amount), 0) AS gmv, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS commissionCost FROM jst_sales_commission_ledger WHERE create_time >= #{periodStart} AND create_time < #{periodEnd}

SELECT l.sales_id AS salesId, s.sales_name AS salesName, COUNT(DISTINCT l.order_id) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(l.base_amount), 0) AS gmv, COALESCE(SUM(l.amount), 0) AS commission, COALESCE(SUM(l.amount), 0) AS commissionAmount FROM jst_sales_commission_ledger l LEFT JOIN jst_sales s ON s.sales_id = l.sales_id WHERE l.create_time >= #{periodStart} AND l.create_time < #{periodEnd} GROUP BY l.sales_id, s.sales_name ORDER BY commission DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT business_type AS businessType, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS orderCount FROM jst_sales_commission_ledger WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND status IN ('accrued', 'settled', 'paid') GROUP BY business_type

SELECT bucket, COALESCE(SUM(commissionTotal), 0) AS commissionTotal, COALESCE(SUM(orderNetTotal), 0) AS orderNetTotal FROM ( SELECT AS bucket, SUM(l.amount) AS commissionTotal, 0 AS orderNetTotal FROM jst_sales_commission_ledger l LEFT JOIN jst_channel c ON c.channel_id = l.channel_id
WHERE COALESCE(l.accrued_at, l.accrue_at) >= #{periodStart} AND COALESCE(l.accrued_at, l.accrue_at) < #{periodEnd} AND l.status IN ('accrued', 'settled', 'paid')
AND l.business_type = #{businessType}
AND LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%')
GROUP BY
UNION ALL
SELECT AS bucket, 0 AS commissionTotal, SUM(o.net_pay_amount) AS orderNetTotal FROM jst_order_main o LEFT JOIN jst_channel c ON c.channel_id = o.channel_id
WHERE o.pay_time >= #{periodStart} AND o.pay_time < #{periodEnd} AND o.order_status = 'paid'
AND o.business_type = #{businessType}
AND LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%')
GROUP BY ) trend GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN l.raw_amount > l.amount OR l.compress_ratio < 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS triggeredCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.raw_amount > l.amount THEN l.raw_amount - l.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS compressedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(l.raw_amount), 0) AS originalTotal FROM jst_sales_commission_ledger l LEFT JOIN jst_channel c ON c.channel_id = l.channel_id
WHERE COALESCE(l.accrued_at, l.accrue_at) >= #{periodStart} AND COALESCE(l.accrued_at, l.accrue_at) < #{periodEnd} AND l.status IN ('accrued', 'settled', 'paid')
AND l.business_type = #{businessType}
AND LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%')

SELECT AS region, o.business_type AS businessType, COUNT(DISTINCT o.channel_id) AS channelCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.net_pay_amount), 0) AS gmv FROM jst_order_main o LEFT JOIN jst_channel c ON c.channel_id = o.channel_id
WHERE o.pay_time >= #{periodStart} AND o.pay_time < #{periodEnd} AND o.order_status = 'paid'
AND o.business_type = #{businessType}
AND LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%')
GROUP BY , o.business_type ORDER BY gmv DESC, region ASC, businessType ASC
